create.title: New store
create.importCountriesPlaceholder: Type country or code and press Enter
create.importCountriesHelper: You can search by name or code and add multiple countries.
create.noContactChannels: No channels added yet. Add at least one so users can contact this store.
create.noAddresses: No addresses added yet. You can add one when available.

duplicate.suggestionsDescription: Check if any of these match before creating a new one.

success.title: Store created
success.approvedMessage: Your store is published and visible in the listing.
success.pendingMessage: Your store is visible in search and listings, and is pending moderation.
success.redirectingToStore: Store created. Redirecting to the store profile...

detail.pendingDisclaimerMessage: This profile was created by the community and has not been verified by our team yet. Please review the information with caution.
detail.noDescription: This store does not have a description yet.

validation.presenceRequired: Select at least one (online or physical)
validation.categoryInvalid: One or more categories are invalid
validation.contactValueInvalidWebsite: Enter a valid website URL (http or https)
validation.contactValueInvalidWhatsApp: Enter a valid WhatsApp URL (wa.me or whatsapp.com)

error.unauthorized: You must sign in to create a store.
error.validation_failed: Please check the fields and try again.
error.create_failed: Could not create the store. Please try again.
